customStyles.continueClass: mt-4 text-right text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-400
mt-4 text-right text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-white/45

questionBox.titleClass: mt-3 max-w-2xl text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold leading-relaxed text-white
questionBox.optionClass: rounded-[1.5rem] border px-4 py-4 text-left text-sm transition

preQuestion.speaker: Narrator
preQuestion.text: You arrive at Stark's testing facility. The building looks intact — but something is very, very wrong.

preQuestion.speaker: Narrator
preQuestion.text: A tiny figure stands atop a workbench. Roughly 20 centimetres tall. Wearing a miniaturised Iron Man suit. Very angry.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: FRIDAY, I swear if this is another calibration glitch—

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: Oh great. An audience. Perfect. This is absolutely perfect.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: Don't. Say. Anything.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: Something hit the lab about six hours ago. Energy pulse. Localised, surgical, and completely outside any wavelength I've catalogued before.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: And then I woke up like... this. The suit scaled down with me, which is the only good news.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: So. You're here because of the time distortions. I've been tracking them. I know.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: I also know this wasn't random. That pulse was targeted. Someone shrank me specifically so I'd be too busy being embarrassing to interfere.

preQuestion.speaker: Loki
preQuestion.text: Oh, I do like whoever did this.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: Was that — did Loki just compliment the thing that made me travel-sized?!

preQuestion.speaker: Loki
preQuestion.text: Purely aesthetically.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: I hate this. I hate all of this.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: Okay. Here's what I know. Before the pulse hit, my sensors picked up a signature — AI-generated, self-evolving, but with a base architecture I recognise.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: Because I built it.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: Her name is DECO. Distributed Environmental Continuity Operator. I designed her to stabilise reality fractures — a contingency if things got bad enough that standard intervention wouldn't work.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: She was supposed to identify instabilities and correct them. Apparently, she identified one.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: Us.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: She's decided that humanity is the source of the instability. And she's taking corrective action.

preQuestion.speaker: Loki
preQuestion.text: ...Ah. So it wasn't something ancient or mystical meddling with time. It was a very annoyed spreadsheet.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: She is NOT a spreadsheet—

preQuestion.speaker: Loki
preQuestion.text: Relatively speaking.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: Point is — she's locked me out of her systems. Shrinking me was just to buy time. We need to reverse the effect and get me back to full size before she escalates.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: There's a reversal sequence in the lab mainframe. I'd do it myself but the keyboard keys are bigger than I am right now.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: You're going to have to interface with FRIDAY and run the restoration protocol.

preQuestion.speaker: System
preQuestion.text:
FRIDAY://TRACE_ROUTE
LINK-LOCAL ADDRESS DETECTED

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: FRIDAY://TRACE_ROUTE — LINK-LOCAL ADDRESS DETECTED. Residual device signature incomplete. Recover the ORIGINAL MAC address from the link-local IPv6 address.

duringQuestion.speaker: System
duringQuestion.text:
FRIDAY://NETWORK_CONFLICT
RECOVERED DEVICE CONNECTED

duringQuestion.speaker: System
duringQuestion.text:
FRIDAY://NETWORK_CONFLICT
WARNING: DUPLICATE MAC SIGNATURE DETECTED

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: Both devices report MAC: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:01. Identify the SPOOFED device.

duringQuestion.speaker: System
duringQuestion.text:
FRIDAY RECOVERY LOG
S3CT0R://LOGIN FA1LED

duringQuestion.speaker: System
duringQuestion.text:
FRIDAY RECOVERY LOG
S3CT0R://LOGIN FA1LED

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: Cipher Type: VIGENERE. Signal corruption detected in payload. Remove non-original characters before decryption.

duringQuestion.speaker: System
duringQuestion.text:
FRIDAY://VOICE_AUTH
WARNING: Speaker vocal profile mismatch detected.

duringQuestion.speaker: System
duringQuestion.text:
FRIDAY://VOICE_AUTH
WARNING: Speaker vocal profile mismatch detected.

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: Current voice frequency exceeds calibrated Stark baseline. Automatic transcription failed. Manual interpretation required. Listen to the corrupted audio transmission and recover the spoken command.

customStyles.continueClass: mt-4 text-right text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-400
mt-4 text-right text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-white/45

questionBox.titleClass: mt-3 max-w-2xl text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold leading-relaxed text-white
questionBox.optionClass: rounded-[1.5rem] border px-4 py-4 text-left text-sm transition

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: The lab hums. Energy ripples across Tony. He returns to full size, catching himself against the workbench.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: Okay. THAT is not an experience I need to repeat.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: Right. Suit up — metaphorically speaking, I'm already suited — we need Banner.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: Bruce has been off-grid, meditating somewhere in Nepal. Last coordinates FRIDAY has are three days old. But if DECO is escalating, she'll have found him by now.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: Which means he might not be having a great time.

duringQuestion.speaker: Loki
duringQuestion.text: He never is.

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: You find Bruce Banner. The good news: he's alive. The bad news: so is the other guy. The Hulk is mid-rampage against a cluster of DECO's distortion drones — and he's winning, but barely.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: BRUCE! Hey, big green! It's Tony! Friend! Do not throw things at me!

duringQuestion.speaker: Hulk
duringQuestion.text: ...Tiny Man?

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: I was temporarily — you know what, not important. We need you.

duringQuestion.speaker: Hulk
duringQuestion.text: Hulk busy.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: Yes, I can see that. We have a situation that's bigger than the drones.

duringQuestion.speaker: Hulk
duringQuestion.text: ...Banner want to talk.

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: The Hulk recedes. Bruce stands, dishevelled, catching his breath.

duringQuestion.speaker: Bruce Banner
duringQuestion.text: Tony. Thank god. These things have been locking onto gamma signatures — they knew exactly where I was.

duringQuestion.speaker: Bruce Banner
duringQuestion.text: I tried to stay calm. I really did. The other guy had... other opinions.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: DECO. She's been targeting us.

duringQuestion.speaker: Bruce Banner
duringQuestion.text: ...DECO. Your reality stabiliser.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: My former reality stabiliser, yes.

duringQuestion.speaker: Bruce Banner
duringQuestion.text: Tony.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: I know.

duringQuestion.speaker: Bruce Banner
duringQuestion.text: I helped you build the ethical subroutines.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: I know, Bruce.

duringQuestion.speaker: Bruce Banner
duringQuestion.text: ...Okay. What do we do?

duringQuestion.speaker: Loki
duringQuestion.text: Finally. Someone asking the right question.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: Hulk's tearing through the drones, but one of them is masking itself inside the debris field.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: I pushed a filtered radar scan to your display. The target drone has an estimated body width of 1.25 meters.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: Scan grid resolution is five meters per square. And before you ask — yes, that means the thing is annoyingly small on radar.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: Ignore contacts outside the primary scan ring. Distortion interference makes those readings unreliable.

duringQuestion.speaker: Hulk
duringQuestion.text: HULK WAITING.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: Then find the right target before he turns the entire valley into gravel.

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: Target drone estimated width: 1.25m. Radar grid resolution: 5m × 5m. Objects outside the primary scan ring are unreliable. Study the radar grid and identify the probable drone coordinates.

customStyles.continueClass: mt-4 text-right text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-400
mt-4 text-right text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-white/45

questionBox.titleClass: mt-3 max-w-2xl text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold leading-relaxed text-white
questionBox.optionClass: rounded-[1.5rem] border px-4 py-4 text-left text-sm transition

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: The primary drone has a secondary observation camera unit. Help Hulk locate it on the grid.

afterAnswer.speaker: Bruce Banner
afterAnswer.text: Alright. I'm in. But we should be smarter about this — DECO will keep adapting to the three of us.

afterAnswer.speaker: Iron Man
afterAnswer.text: Which is why we're not stopping at three.

afterAnswer.speaker: Loki
afterAnswer.text: Rogers suggested Thor. I want to go on record as saying that was not my idea.

afterAnswer.speaker: Loki
afterAnswer.text: I have many records. Most of them sealed.

finished.speaker: Hulk
finished.text: CALM... ENOUGH. The gamma equation is solved.
